search_queries_used: Domain A: (nephrotic syndrome OR IgA nephropathy OR IgA vasculitis OR CAKUT OR vesicoureteral reflux OR pediatric AKI OR neonatal AKI) AND (children OR pediatric OR infant OR neonatal)

Domain B: (pediatric leukemia OR pediatric ALL OR pediatric AML OR Hodgkin lymphoma OR neuroblastoma OR medulloblastoma OR pediatric lymphoma OR pediatric transplant OR CAR-T) AND (children OR pediatric)

Domain C: (RSV nirsevimab OR pediatric vaccine OR streptococcal infection children OR neonatal sepsis OR necrotizing enterocolitis OR febrile neutropenia children) AND (children OR pediatric OR infant OR neonatal)
Domain D: (pediatric sepsis OR pediatric shock OR pediatric ECMO OR pediatric appendicitis OR PECARN OR PICU OR pediatric critical care OR pediatric resuscitation) AND (children OR pediatric)

Domain E: (preterm infant OR premature infant OR neonatal jaundice OR hyperbilirubinemia OR retinopathy prematurity OR surfactant treatment OR BPD bronchopulmonary dysplasia OR newborn screening) AND (neonatal OR newborn OR preterm OR infant)

Domain F: (pediatric asthma OR dupilumab children OR food allergy children OR peanut allergy OIT OR atopic dermatitis children OR eczema infant OR wheeze children) AND (children OR pediatric OR infant)

Domain G: (pediatric epilepsy OR Dravet syndrome OR status epilepticus children OR autism children OR ADHD children OR SMA spinal muscular atrophy OR Duchenne muscular dystrophy) AND (children OR pediatric)

Domain H: (type 1 diabetes children OR pediatric obesity OR precocious puberty OR growth hormone children OR neonatal diabetes OR insulin pump children OR closed-loop insulin) AND (children OR pediatric OR adolescent)
Domain I: (pediatric Crohn OR pediatric IBD OR pediatric inflammatory bowel OR biliary atresia OR pediatric liver transplant OR pediatric NAFLD OR MASLD children) AND (children OR pediatric)
Domain J: (Kawasaki disease OR MIS-C OR Fontan procedure OR congenital heart disease children OR pediatric cardiology OR pediatric heart failure) AND (children OR pediatric)

Domain K: (pediatric pharmacokinetics OR off-label pediatric OR pediatric palliative care OR child abuse OR abusive head trauma OR transition care adolescent OR childhood cancer survivor) AND (children OR pediatric OR adolescent)

Tier1 journals: (N Engl J Med[jour] OR Lancet[jour] OR JAMA[jour] OR JAMA Pediatr[jour] OR Pediatrics[jour] OR J Pediatr[jour] OR Lancet Child Adolesc Health[jour] OR BMJ[jour]) AND (child OR pediatric OR infant OR neonatal)

papers.title: Digital Media Use and Child Health and Development: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
papers.abstract: IMPORTANCE: This systematic review and meta-analysis synthesized global longitudinal studies to estimate associations between social media, video games, and other digital media use with health and developmental outcomes in children and adolescents. OBJECTIVE: To provide a meta-analytic synthesis of evidence on digital media use and health and developmental outcomes among individuals aged 0 to 18 years.
papers.summary_ja: ソーシャルメディア・ビデオゲームなどのデジタルメディア使用と0〜18歳の健康・発達アウトカムの関連を世界的縦断研究のメタ解析で包括的に評価した。過度なソーシャルメディア使用は精神的健康と逆相関し、乳幼児期のスクリーンタイムは言語・認知発達に悪影響を示す一方、使用内容・目的による影響の異質性も示された。

papers.title: Maternal Acetaminophen Use and Child Neurodevelopment.
papers.abstract: IMPORTANCE: Whether maternal use of acetaminophen during pregnancy is associated with offspring's neurodevelopment remains debated. OBJECTIVE: To evaluate the associations of maternal prenatal prescriptions of acetaminophen with attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) and autism spectrum disorders (ASDs) among offspring. DESIGN, SETTING, PARTICIPANTS: This cohort study analyzed 2 092 926 siblings.
papers.summary_ja: 200万人超の兄弟ペアを含む大規模コホートで、妊娠中アセトアミノフェン処方がADHD・ASD発症リスクと正の関連を示したが、兄弟内比較で一部減弱した。アセトアミノフェンは現時点でも妊娠中の安全な鎮痛解熱薬だが、必要最小限の使用原則を再確認する重要性が示された。

papers.title: Macitentan vs Standard of Care in Pediatric Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension (TOMORROW): A Randomized Clinical Trial.
papers.authors: Berger Rolf M F et al.
papers.abstract: OBJECTIVES: To evaluate pharmacokinetics (PK), efficacy, and safety of macitentan vs standard of care (SoC) in pediatric pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH). STUDY DESIGN: TOMORROW was a multi-center, open-label, phase 3 clinical trial in patients aged ≥2-<18 years with WHO-FC I-III. Patients were randomized (1:1) to macitentan (bodyweight-based dosing) or SoC.
papers.summary_ja: 2〜18歳の小児PAH患者を対象に、マシテンタン（体重換算用量）と標準治療を1:1で無作為化したPhase 3 RCT（TOMORROW試験）。体重ベース用量設定が成人と同等のPKを達成し、機能改善・忍容性でも良好な結果を示した小児PAH領域初のRCT。

papers.title: Family Navigation to Reduce Disparities in Early Intervention Services: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
papers.abstract: OBJECTIVE: Disparities in early intervention (EI) use are well documented. We sought to determine the effects of family navigation (FN) on EI services use and child development among low-income, racially diverse children with suspected developmental delays. METHODS: RCT at 6 pediatric practices.
papers.summary_ja: 低所得・多人種の発達遅延リスク児を対象にファミリーナビゲーション（訓練済み支援員による早期介入サービス申込支援）の効果をRCTで検証。早期介入サービス利用率と子どもの発達指標が有意に改善した。
papers.domain_name: トランジション医療・格差是正

papers.title: Ruxolitinib and Tocilizumab for Child Bronchiolitis Obliterans After Toxic Epidermal Necrolysis.
papers.abstract: Toxic epidermal necrolysis (TEN) is a life-threatening mucocutaneous disorder with rare but potentially fatal respiratory complications. We present an exceptional documented case of TEN with severe bronchial obstruction successfully treated with tocilizumab and ruxolitinib in an 11-year-old patient.
papers.summary_ja: TEN（中毒性表皮壊死症）後に重篤な気管支閉塞症（BO）を発症した11歳の症例に対し、ステロイド抵抗性の状態でトシリズマブ（IL-6受容体拮抗薬）+ルキソリチニブ（JAK1/2阻害薬）の併用療法が奏効した希少症例。TEN後の気道合併症管理における新たな治療選択肢を示した。
papers.domain_name: 小児アレルギー・呼吸器

papers.title: Peanut Allergy.
papers.summary_ja: ピーナッツアレルギーの疫学・診断・管理（経口免疫療法・予防的早期導入を含む）についてJAMAが包括的に解説したレビュー論文。LEAP試験以降の予防戦略と治療選択肢を整理した実臨床向けの概説。

papers.title: Genetic Syndromes Do Not Affect Survival but Increase Morbidity in Neonates with Symptomatic Tetralogy of Fallot.
papers.abstract: OBJECTIVE: To assess associations between the presence of genetic diagnoses and survival and morbidity of patients with symptomatic tetralogy of Fallot (sTOF) requiring neonatal intervention.
papers.summary_ja: 症候性Fallot四徴症（新生児期介入が必要）の多施設コホートで、遺伝的症候群合併は移植回避生存率に影響しないが、術後罹患率（入院期間・合併症）を有意に増加させることを示した。

papers.title: Eliminating the Hepatitis B Vaccine Birth Dose-A New Threat to Pediatric Transfusion Safety.
papers.summary_ja: 米国での出生時B型肝炎ワクチン接種廃止が輸血安全性に与えるリスクを警告したJAMA Pediatricsの論評。HBV未接種患者からの供血増加による小児患者への感染リスク増大を指摘。

papers.title: Variation in Management of Children With Coccidioidomycosis.
papers.abstract: OBJECTIVE: Coccidioidomycosis (CM) is not as well described in children as it is in adults. The Kaiser Permanente Southern California (KPSC) system provides care within an endemic region for CM.
papers.summary_ja: 南カリフォルニアの大規模医療システムでの小児コクシジオイデス症コホートで、診断・治療・アウトカムに著しいばらつきがあることを初めて体系的に記述し、標準的管理ガイドライン策定の必要性を示した。

papers.title: Infancy IgE Methylation Score and Childhood Wheezing and Asthma; a Multi-Cohort Study.
papers.journal: The Journal of allergy and clinical immunology
papers.abstract: BACKGROUND: Early life epigenetic programming may mediate gene-environment interactions underlying recurrent wheezing and asthma. Multi-CpG methylation scores can summarize the epigenetic potential for high immunoglobulin E (IgE) beyond what is captured by observed IgE levels.
papers.summary_ja: 乳児期のDNAメチル化によるIgEエピジェネティックスコア（DNAm-IgE）が観察IgE値とは独立して小児期の喘鳴・喘息リスクと関連することを複数コホートで示した。喘息早期リスク予測への新たなバイオマーカー候補。

papers.title: Clinical evaluation of ThecaFlex DRx, a novel implantable catheter-port for intrathecal nusinersen delivery in spinal muscular atrophy: Initial results from the PIERRE-IDE study.
papers.abstract: BACKGROUND: Administration of Nusinersen requires repeated lumbar intrathecal access, posing challenges for patients with Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA). A purpose-built system may streamline drug delivery.
papers.summary_ja: 脊柱変形により腰椎穿刺困難なSMA患者への繰り返し髄腔内ヌシネルセン投与を可能にする専用埋め込み型カテーテルポートシステム（ThecaFlex DRx）の実現可能性と安全性をPIERRE-IDE試験で初めて評価した。

papers.title: Energetic adaptations to weight loss in children and adolescents with obesity: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
papers.abstract: BACKGROUND: While weight loss often triggers adaptations to prevent further weight loss, these remain understudied and under-considered in the context of pediatric obesity.
papers.summary_ja: 小児・青年の肥満における体重減少時のエネルギー消費適応（代謝適応・適応的熱産生）を初めて系統的にメタ解析。成人同様の代謝適応が存在することを示し、小児肥満治療のリバウンドメカニズム解明に貢献。
papers.domain_name: 肥満・メタボリック症候群

papers.title: Health Care Utilization and Neighborhood Violence: 2019-2023.
papers.abstract: BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVES: Children experience the highest impact from neighborhood violence (NV) exposure. Timely access to care has proven to mitigate these untoward effects.
papers.summary_ja: 米国の全国データ（2019〜2023年）を用い、近隣暴力曝露のある小児はCOVID-19パンデミック期を含め医療アクセスが一貫して低下していることを示した。社会的決定要因と医療アクセスの関係を定量化。
papers.domain_name: 小児特有の横断的テーマ

papers.title: Federal Funding Cuts Threaten US Pediatric Health.
papers.summary_ja: 米国の連邦予算削減がMedicaid・小児科研究・予防プログラムに与える影響を警告したJAMA Pediatricsの論評。小児保健への医師の政策関与の重要性を強調。
papers.domain_name: 小児特有の横断的テーマ

papers.title: Longitudinal Detection of Tumor-Specific Peptides in Cerebrospinal Fluid for Pediatric Brain Tumor Surveillance.
papers.abstract: Pediatric brain tumor survivors remain at high risk of recurrence, yet current surveillance strategies relying on neuroimaging and cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) cytology have limited sensitivity for early or minimal disease. Tumor-specific peptides (TSPs) derived from individual tumors represent a promising class of highly specific biomarkers.
papers.summary_ja: 小児脳腫瘍サバイバーのCSF液体生検として腫瘍特異的ペプチドを縦断的に検出する手法を開発・評価。MRI・CSF細胞診より早期に再発を捉える可能性を示した次世代サーベイランス戦略。
